judgment.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. exhibits strong growth and profitability but carries a high valuation and significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported quarter (ending 2026-03-31) EPS of $2.37 beat estimates of $2.27 by 4.6%. Next earnings date is 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth of 90.1% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Profit margin of 17.7% and operating margin of 21.8% demonstrate robust profitability.
Return on equity of 22.8% suggests efficient use of shareholder capital.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (236.6%) and fiscal year (300.7%) are exceptionally high.
The PEG ratio of 0.63 suggests the stock may be undervalued relative to its expected earnings growth.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 157.26x and forward P/E of 49.17x indicate a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 111.44% signifies substantial leverage.
Free cash flow of $93.35M TTM appears low relative to the market cap.
Quick ratio of 0.94 suggests potential short-term liquidity challenges.
Beta of 1.53 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Lumentum (LITE) recently joined the Nasdaq-100 Index, a significant development for the company, yet the stock has experienced a decline.  Broader market sentiment appears mixed with major indices ending in the red and some tech stocks facing pressure, though there are also headlines highlighting potential opportunities in AI semiconductors and broker rating upgrades for other companies.
